title: JobTokenIdentifier
description: The JobTokenIdentifier class is used to identify a job token. It has a constructor that takes a jobid as input and sets it as the jobid for the token. It also has methods to read and write the jobid to/from a DataInput/DataOutput stream. The class extends the TokenIdentifier class and imports the necessary classes for serialization and user/group information.

raw_response:
TITLE: JobTokenIdentifier

DESCRIPTION:
The JobTokenIdentifier class is used to identify a job token. It has a constructor that takes a jobid as input and sets it as the jobid for the token. It also has methods to read and write the jobid to/from a DataInput/DataOutput stream. The class extends the TokenIdentifier class and imports the necessary classes for serialization and user/group information.
